task_completion.description: Verify the code loads the correct data and applies the required filtering and classification logic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code cells show loading 'sanfran_public.h5' (households, buildings, parcels), merging them, filling missing residential units with 0, classifying Single-Family (1 unit) vs Multi-Family (>1 unit), filtering for zones with >= 50 households, and identifying families as >= 3 persons.

task_completion.description: Verify the code exports the top 15 zones to a CSV file with the required columns.

task_completion.description: Verify the code exports the citywide summary metrics to a JSON file.

task_completion.description: Verify the code generates and saves a chart comparing family households in single-family vs multi-family buildings.

task_completion.description: Verify the notebook is fully executed with all outputs visible.
